name: nextstepai-voice
description: NextStepAI Voice - transcripción de voz privada y local

scripts.test: npm run build && node --check src/main.cjs && node --check src/preload.cjs && node src/text-cleanup.test.cjs && node src/whisper-profiles.test.cjs
scripts.test:production: node --check src/main.cjs && node --check src/preload.cjs && node src/text-cleanup.test.cjs && node src/whisper-profiles.test.cjs && node src/transcription-smoke.test.cjs
